---
title: Grove - LoRa Radio 868MHz
description: A long-range radio module for low-power communication projects.
---

# Grove - LoRa Radio 868MHz

## Features

- Frequency: 868 MHz
- Supply voltage: 3.3 to 5 volts

## Specifications

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Communication interface | UART |
| Link budget | 148 dB |

## Pin Definition

| Pin | Function |
| --- | --- |
| TX | Serial output |
| RX | Serial input |

## Resources

- [Library](https://github.com/Seeed-Studio/Grove_LoRa_868MHz)
